data.body:
## Description
Write behavioral tests that verify .tickets/ v2 references are absent from hook and script source files.

## Files to create
- tests/hooks/test-v2-hooks-cleanup.sh (or extend existing test-v2-clean-guard.sh)

## Tests to write
1. test_compute_diff_hash_no_dot_tickets_exclusion — verify compute-diff-hash.sh has no .tickets/ pathspec (only .tickets-tracker/)
2. test_capture_review_diff_no_dot_tickets_grep — verify capture-review-diff.sh has no grep -v .tickets/ lines
3. test_review_classifier_no_dot_tickets_check — verify review-complexity-classifier.sh has no .tickets/* check
4. test_skip_review_no_dot_tickets_pattern — verify skip-review-check.sh has no .tickets/* entry
5. test_cascade_breaker_no_dot_tickets_passthrough — verify cascade-circuit-breaker.sh has no .tickets/ case
6. test_review_stop_no_dot_tickets_exclusion — verify review-stop-check.sh has no .tickets/ grep exclusion
7. test_title_validator_no_dot_tickets_guard — verify title-length-validator.sh has no .tickets/ guard
8. test_orphaned_tasks_deleted — verify orphaned-tasks.sh does not exist
9. test_restore_ticket_bodies_deleted — verify restore-ticket-bodies.sh does not exist

## TDD Requirement
All tests must FAIL (RED) before Task 2 implementation. Tests use negative constraints (assert absence) which is an acceptable structural test category.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tests run and all FAIL (RED state confirmed)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-v2-hooks-cleanup.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAILED'
- [ ] At least 9 test functions exist
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' tests/hooks/test-v2-hooks-cleanup.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 9)}'
